use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PAROXYSMAL NOCTURNAL HEMOGLOBINURIA (PNH) BY ADMINISTRATION OF 200 MG OF IPTACOPAN TWICE DAILY
TREATMENT OF PRIMARY IMMUNOGLOBULIN A NEPHROPATHY (IGAN)
